## Summary
What changed and why?

## Linked issue
Closes #<issue-number>

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Validation
- [ ] Compiles with no errors/warnings (`g++ -std=c++17 -o metro_system.exe main.cpp`)
- [ ] Manually tested the affected menu option(s)

## Evidence
Screenshots or terminal output for the reviewer.

## Reviewer notes
Anything that deserves special attention?
